---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or adapter
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is this related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem. E.g. "I'm frustrated when I switch from Claude to Cursor and lose my..."

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to happen.

**New Adapter Request?**
If requesting a new platform adapter, specify:
- Platform name:
- Config file location:
- What assets it manages (skills/memory/preferences):
- Public API/format documentation link:

**Alternatives considered**
Other solutions you've considered.
